code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut total = 0
  mut line = io.read_line()
  while true
    match line
    when None
      print("sum=#{total}")
      return Ok(())
    when Some(s)
      let trimmed = string.trim(s)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
        match parts.get(1)
        when Some(tok)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(n)
            total = total + n
          when None
            total = total
          end
        when None
          total = total
        end
      end
      line = io.read_line()
    end
  end
  Ok(())
end
